packages.name: EasyEDA to KiCad Importer
packages.description: Import LCSC/EasyEDA components (symbol, footprint, 3D model) into your KiCad library
packages.description_full: A KiCad plugin that lets you paste a LCSC or JLCPCB component ID (e.g. C294018) and automatically downloads and imports the schematic symbol, PCB footprint, and 3D model into your KiCad library. Powered by the easyeda2kicad open-source tool. The plugin installs easyeda2kicad automatically on first use if it is not already present.
